ddls:
CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion data entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete being analyzed */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session or event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data capture */,
  "body_part" TEXT /* Body part being captured */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate of the body part */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate of the body part */,
  "z_coordinate" REAL /* Z coordinate of the body part */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the captured joint position */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor or camera used to capture the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the athlete participates in */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* A brief history of any past injuries */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete's trainer or coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session (e.g., Training 1) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach or trainer conducting the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, competition) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, athlete, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion data being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., injury risk assessment) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analysis */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the analysis result */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES motion_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete the metric is related to */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., speed, agility) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the metric */,
  "metric_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session related to the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Feedback comments from the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp of the setting */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
